Max Pain cluster (650-665) acts as magnetic zone. Extreme PCR ratios (up to 3.99 monthly) suggest oversold conditions with potential for squeeze if resistance breaks. Bearish skew in weekly/monthly confirms hedging pressure.

Monthly Max Pain 1.5% above spot. Combined with 0DTE Call OI (9K). Upside magnetic target.
Dominant Call OI in 0DTE (33K) with presence in WEEKLY (5.7K) and MONTHLY (18K+20K Put). Primary resistance zone.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected. Negative total GEX (-0.41B) indicates dealers are short gamma, which will amplify directional moves. Bearish momentum likely to accelerate if spot breaks below 0DTE gamma flip at 23552.
outlook.summary: Market positioned with significant bearish bias across 0DTE and MONTHLY expirations. Bearish volatility smirk (ratio 1.21-1.42) confirms put premium demand. Negative gamma exposure suggests volatility expansion. Key support cluster at 24000-23900 zone, with critical gamma flip at 23552 as structural pivot. 25000 CALL WALL represents dominant structural resistance across all three expirations (RESONANCE). Unusual put activity at 23300 (VOL/OI ratio 4.98) indicates heavy hedging flow.

levels.motivazione: Highest CALL OI across ALL three expirations (0DTE: 684, WEEKLY: 102, MONTHLY: 65). Rare RESONANCE structure - maximum dealer hedging resistance zone.
Dominant PUT OI in 0DTE (452) and MONTHLY (597). Major institutional support zone with multi-expiry validation.
0DTE PUT OI 438 coincides with Max Pain. Above spot creates upward magnet effect. Dealer short-put hedging supports rally toward this level.
Highest MONTHLY CALL OI (410) combined with WEEKLY CALL OI (201). Secondary resistance cluster below 25000 structural cap.
0DTE GEX sign change level. Critical pivot where dealer hedging behavior shifts. Below this = volatility regime acceleration.
PUT OI 147/209 with EXTREME VOL/OI ratio (4.98) in 0DTE. Heavy hedging flow indicates institutional protection. Deep support.
MONTHLY PUT OI 241. Immediate support just 17 pts below spot. First line of defense for current trading range.
MONTHLY Max Pain level. Natural price attraction target for options expiry. CALL OI 231 provides additional resistance confluence.
